name: design-to-code
description: GitHub Copilot Chat participant that transforms Japanese design documents (Excel/Word) into runnable Spring Boot applications.

chatParticipants.name: design-to-code
chatParticipants.description: Transforms Japanese design documents (Excel/Word specs) into Spring Boot applications. Use /extract to parse docs, /generate to produce code.

commands.name: extract
commands.description: Phase 1: Extract text, tables, and images from .xlsx/.docx design documents

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Phase 2: Generate a Spring Boot application from extracted specifications

commands.name: build
commands.description: Phase 3: Compile the generated app, auto-fix errors, and launch it on localhost:8080

commands.name: help
commands.description: Show workflow overview and usage instructions
